summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The 12 hydrated open PRs are independent review candidates with no shared canonical and no safe close/merge path in this shard. Of the 13 refs with unavailable live state, 12 remain needs_human due GitHub API rate limits, and #83160 is routed to central security handling because the job inventory describes security-shaped prompt-injection guard work.
